headline: JP Morgan Downgrades A.O. Smith to Underweight, Lowers Price Target to $60
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tomohiko Sano   downgrades A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) from Neutral to Underweight and lowers the price target from $65 to $60.
